creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Have you been to @kokobayuae?

This beautiful restaurant in Palm West Beach transports us to the tropics! It has a Bali-inspired design and laidback atmosphere. 

It’s perfect for lazy weekend breakfast by the beach. Choices are hearty and reasonably priced. We had the Full English (79 AED) and Eggs Benedict (59 AED). 

Tag your breakfast date! 💚

#Kokobay #PalmWestBeach #PalmJumeirah
